message.reasoning_content:
The user is asking for the result of the multiplication of 17 and 23.

I can calculate this mentally:
17 * 23

Method 1: Distributive property
= 17 * (20 + 3)
= 17 * 20 + 17 * 3
= 340 + 51
= 391

Method 2: Difference of squares
= (20 - 3) * (20 + 3)
= 20^2 - 3^2
= 400 - 9
= 391

Method 3: Standard algorithm
  17
x 23
----
  51  (17 * 3)
 34   (17 * 2, shifted one position)
----
 391

The answer is 391.
